name: ml/data — LumindAd Data Layer
description: Data storage layer for LumindAd ML pipelines. Three-tier architecture: raw ingestion, processed datasets, and offline API cache.

raw/.note: Add new source datasets here. Do not edit existing files.

processed/.purpose: Clean, enriched, tabular datasets ready for ML training
processed/.note: Generated by notebooks. Reproducible from raw/ via pipeline.

cache/.purpose: Offline TTL cache for external API calls
cache/.note: Auto-managed by OfflineCache class. Do not edit .pkl files manually.

conventions.versions: Bump version on schema changes, not on data refreshes
conventions.readmes: Each subfolder has its own README.json with schema and metadata

author: Elizabeth Díaz Familia · Sustainable AI Scientist
